gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved with no merge-blocking findings after checking import-order isolation, pristine inheritance, legacy hooks, pickle/slots behavior, runner output, and diff hygiene.
what_changed: Loaded clean document_kv_cache.databricks_job defaults for the legacy Databricks job facade.
Preserved honest legacy Databricks job config classes while avoiding import-order capture of public module monkeypatches.
Added regression coverage for public Databricks job monkeypatches applied before importing the legacy facade.
why: Keeps the migration-only restaurant namespace safe while the package moves Databricks benchmark job ownership into document_kv_cache for the open-source Cachet package.
